rdf:Description.dc:description: Plan view (overhead) of the tripod bucket layout. Three buckets A / B / C at the vertices of an equilateral triangle with side L_base = 20.0 m (prototype, 285.7 mm model). Shake direction along the A-B axis; section plane of Fig 1(a) indicated by dashed line. All three buckets paired with distinct hatches (plain / // / xx) so the identity survives B&W print.
